service: Inbound AI Voice Agent — Damp Proofing

challenges.impact: New enquiries and existing customers hit a gap — calls miss or bounce to a busy team member who can't give proper attention
Time-consuming, inconsistent, and availability-dependent — customers expect a fast, professional response whenever they call

challenges.area: GHL not wired to the inbound channel
challenges.impact: Leads fall through, no automation on call outcomes, no pipeline visibility from inbound calls

challenges.area: Every missed enquiry is real revenue lost
challenges.impact: At startup stage each inbound call is disproportionately valuable — there's no buffer for missed opportunities

approach.body:
DampHQ doesn't need a complex AI system — it needs a reliable, professional front door that never closes.

An AI agent that's transparent about being AI removes awkwardness, keeps costs low, and ensures every caller — new enquiry or existing customer chasing a warranty claim — gets a consistent response and lands in the right place.

The build connects the agent directly to GHL so every call outcome creates an action. No manual data entry, no calls that disappear.

items.activity: Audit existing GHL — pipelines, calendars, tags, automations
items.benefit: Build on what's already working — no redundancy, no conflicts

items.activity: Configure inbound pipeline stage and contact tagging
items.benefit: Every caller auto-categorised: new enquiry, existing customer, warranty claim

items.activity: Calendar setup + GHL automation triggers on call outcomes
items.benefit: Call ends → action starts. Agent books, CRM updates, no manual follow-up

items.activity: Custom prompt — transparent AI persona ("Hi, I'm the DampHQ AI assistant")
items.benefit: Sets expectations from the first second, builds trust, reduces drop-off

items.activity: Dual call flow: new enquiry path + existing customer path (warranty, status, general)
items.benefit: One agent handles both use cases — caller reaches the right outcome regardless of why they called

items.activity: Live calendar booking — agent books appointments directly into GHL
items.benefit: Enquiries convert to booked calls without a human step in between

items.activity: n8n workflow connecting call outcomes to GHL — contacts created, pipeline updated, follow-up triggered
items.benefit: Every call is captured and acted on automatically — nothing falls through

items.activity: Internal alerts on high-priority calls (warranty claims, hot enquiries)
items.benefit: Team is notified instantly for calls that need a human — nothing waits until someone checks CRM

items.activity: Post-call SMS/email confirmation triggered by call type
items.benefit: Customer gets an immediate next step after the call ends — professional experience from Day 1

investment.roi_framing: A single damp proofing installation job covers this investment many times over. The agent pays for itself the first time it books a job you would have otherwise missed.

bonuses.bonus: Backup Twilio Number with Call Rotation
bonuses.detail: Second number set up and auto-rotated — protects against spam flagging, keeps the agent handling volume with zero downtime
We listen to real calls, review booking rates, and tune the prompt after go-live. This is where the agent goes from good to reliable — included at no extra cost

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — 100% upfront, details provided on confirmation
Onboarding — Share access to GHL, Retell, and Twilio to begin setup
Kick-off call — 30 min to align on call flow priorities and go-live date

terms.detail: Includes Parts 1–3 as described. Excluded: ad spend, website dev, content production, ongoing management beyond the 2-week optimisation window. Third-party platform costs (Retell, Twilio usage) at client's expense.
Bug fixes and prompt adjustments included for 14 days post-delivery (3 revision rounds). Changes outside original scope quoted separately.
All systems built inside DampHQ's accounts — client property, no lock-in.
